text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the crowd is in a frenzy! Is this how all
Japan's G1 races are?

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
This race seems to have a rich history. Can you
believe our beloved Schatzi is running in it?

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text: Mm... Good luck, Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems my parents have arrived safely at the
venue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Everything is unfolding perfectly, and I am in
good condition. Now all I must do is carry out my
plans and...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Right...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please observe today's race alongside my parents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will come and find you all after the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(Mother and Father are somewhere within that
roaring crowd.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I decided to complete all these races because I
wanted to become someone the two people I
admire most in this world could be proud of.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I believe that to be "right." But... my image of
that truth has changed.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(After meeting Trainer and comprehending my
own shortcomings, I acquired a new perspective.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(During the Derby, a fire was lit in my heart, and I
learned that my tenacity is the key to grasp
victory.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(The racers of the Ultimate Era are formidable, to
the extent I considered forfeiting my plan.
However...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I had people who were there to tell me that I am
more than my shortcomings.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: (The "truth" I have come to possess...)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is who I am at this moment.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
(I've changed since the day I bid farewell to my
parents and left for Japan.)

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will prove how far I have come. To Father, to
Mother... and to you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Auf geht's! It's time to put my pride on the line!
